definitions.text: To rest in a state of reduced consciousness.
examples: You should sleep eight hours a day.

definitions.text: To have sexual intercourse (see sleep with).
examples: Last night we slept together for the first time.
This caravan can sleep four people comfortably.

definitions.text: The state of reduced consciousness during which a human or animal rests in a daily rhythm.
examples: We need to conduct an overnight sleep test to diagnose your sleep problem.

definitions.text: An act or instance of sleeping.
examples: I’m just going to have a quick sleep.
There are only three sleeps till Christmas!
